programme.title: Finding Bigfoot
programme.desc: The team is back to Louisiana to investigate a trail of camera photo of a possible sasquatch.

programme.title: Off Limits
programme.desc: Don grooms an Olympic ski jump in Utah, fires off a few rounds in MA, gets front row for a rocket launch in CA, demolishes a pier and goes high-voltage in Boston.

programme.title: The Vet Life
programme.desc: Police rescue a turtle caught on fishing line and it's up to Dr Ross to unhook him. Dr Blue awaits test results after performing dental surgery on a dachshund.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Scratch Tracks
programme.desc: A couple has reached a breaking point because of the vicious attacks their cats unleash on each other whenever they are left alone together; another couple can't seem to agree on the best way to handle their Bengal cat's constant attacks.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans
programme.desc: To prepare for the unforgiving season when temperatures drop to -50, everyone must search for the one animal large enough to feed a family through winter.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees
programme.desc: Tia hires 3 new parolees, but things quickly take a turn for the worse. A rural shelter threatened with closure needs Tia's help.

programme.title: Saving Britain's Wildlife
programme.desc: A raven that was kept as a pet must forget its tame behavior if it's ever to return to the wild. Then, a deer is trapped between crumbling cliffs and the rising tide, and baby blackbirds separated from their parents need to be hand reared.

programme.title: Vantara: Sanctuary Stories
programme.desc: At Vantara, King Cheetah race freely across a stadium-sized field. And Forrest marvels as an orangutan enjoys his birthday with cake.

programme.title: Vantara: Sanctuary Stories
programme.desc: Forrest visits Vantara to see efforts securing a future for rare species. He joins a cheetah feeding circle, meets newborn cubs, and follows a once orphaned sun bear called Prince, thriving, and is ready to take on the world.

programme.title: Saving Britain's Wildlife
programme.desc: The staff at East Winch Wildlife centre tackle the growing problem of seals trapped in discarded fishing nets. A swan has its foot caught in discarded rubble.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot
programme.desc: Finding Bigfoot travels to Eastern Washington and the Blue Mountains to meet with anatomy expert professor Jeff Meldrum. With accounts going back for half a century the team is optimistic about finding something in the woods.

programme.title: Off Limits
programme.desc: Don shoots the rapids and mucks out pig stalls in North Carolina, learns the secrets of bull riding in Texas.

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: ATM has been so busy they could use a glass of wine! Good thing their next tank is on a vineyard. CEO of Jordan Winery wants a beautiful reef tank to live on his winery. After all, what's better than sipping on a merlot by the ocean?

programme.title: Rugged Justice
programme.desc: In busy waters, Washington's Fish and Wildlife officers respond to a boating accident. Then they face a suspect with a dangerous past.

programme.title: Vantara: Sanctuary Stories
programme.desc: Forrest visits Vantara to see efforts securing a future for rare species. He joins a cheetah feeding circle, meets newborn cubs, and follows a once orphaned sun bear called Prince, thriving, and is ready to take on the world.

programme.desc: The staff at East Winch Wildlife centre tackle the growing problem of seals trapped in discarded fishing nets. A swan has its foot caught in discarded rubble.

programme.title: The Vet Life
programme.desc: Police rescue a turtle caught on fishing line and it's up to Dr Ross to unhook him. Dr Blue awaits test results after performing dental surgery on a dachshund.

programme.title: How Do Animals Do That?
programme.desc: Dogs reveal what they really see when they watch TV, gravity-defying insects share their secrets & snakes demonstrate how they can eat things bigger than their heads!

programme.title: Dolphin Days
programme.desc: Food is the order of the day as the DRC's dolphins prepare for meal time and the Atlantic spotted dolphins go hunting in the Bahamas.

programme.title: Dolphin Days
programme.desc: The wild dolphins in the Bahamas show researches how they like to play while the dolphins in Florida show off their intelligence.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans
programme.desc: To prepare for the unforgiving season when temperatures drop to -50, everyone must search for the one animal large enough to feed a family through winter.

programme.title: Rugged Justice
programme.desc: Officers arrest an intoxicated and belligerent driver. Plus, a lying suspect with a warrant for obstructing law enforcement is apprehended.

programme.title: The Zoo
programme.desc: Armani the Aardvark suffers from a mouth infection which seems to only get worse every day. Plus, the brown bears keep digging up and destroying their exhibit.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees
programme.desc: Tia hires 3 new parolees, but things quickly take a turn for the worse. A rural shelter threatened with closure needs Tia's help.

programme.title: Dancing With Sharks

programme.desc: Following the death of their friend, two girls in their late twenties embark on a road trip to spread his ashes. Seph and Alex take turns driving. Dan is in the glove compartment, in tupperware, decreasing in volume as the trip progresses.

programme.title: Mary Shelley

programme.title: The Liability

programme.title: Harry Brown
programme.desc: An elderly retired marine takes the law into his own hands when his friend is murdered by hoodlums on a London estate.

programme.title: The Best Offer

programme.title: Felicia's Journey
programme.desc: A lonely middle-aged catering manager with a dark past helps an Irish immigrant get settled while she searches for her boyfriend.

programme.title: What We Did On Our Holiday
programme.desc: A family of five is off to Granddad's big 75th birthday party at an uncle's estate in rural Scotland. The parents are separated and hope their three kids won't mention it. The kids love, can talk with, and will do anything for, Granddad.

programme.desc: A talking cat, a pack of intelligent rats, and a fake pied piper work together scamming villages by charging them for dealing with staged plagues of rats, until one of their targets winds up having a far more sinister secret than their own.

programme.desc: A robber tries to hide from a K-9 unit. A driver attempts to convince officers that marijuana is harmless. A man runs from police after making an obscene inquiry.

programme.title: Cops Reloaded
programme.desc: A man caught urinating in public gets into a lengthy scuffle with police. A car thief claims a crack addict let him borrow his car. Police investigate a drunken bar fight. A couple seek help.

programme.title: Cops Reloaded
programme.desc: A criminal lectures officers on how the law works. A mother chastises her child after she is caught with drugs. A suicidal man claims he only wanted attention. A father takes the fall for his son.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women may appear to be sugar coated, but outside appearances can be deceiving; they are made of sugar and spite.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: When a security professional is found shot outside his home, police fear retaliation from someone at an event he worked that night; but rumors of an affair point them in a new direction, revealing disturbing lies and betrayal.

programme.title: Sins & Secrets
programme.desc: In 2005, David and Lorrie Donivan were found brutally stabbed to death. The investigation gave rise to a terrifying theory: the town was being stalked by one of its own.

programme.title: The Basement: Vanishing In Apple Valley
programme.desc: When a mother, her two kids, and a friend vanish from a blood-soaked Ohio home, investigators trace a store receipt to suspect Matthew Hoffman. Are the victims still alive?

programme.title: The Basement: Vanishing In Apple Valley
programme.desc: 13-year-old Sarah is rescued from a terrifying basement, but three others remain missing. Investigators face a desperate race against time to break suspect Matthew Hoffman.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Investigators home in on the killer of a young woman after they discover a link with a murder that occurred elsewhere.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a college student is reported missing, police believe their investigation will be like countless others, and she'd turn up a few days later. Soon, they realise this case is going to be different.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A serial rapist was on the loose in a Texas town. No one knew where he'd strike next, but the audacity of his attacks and the escalation of violence against his victims made finding him imperative.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Green Eyed Killers
programme.desc: In Deltona, Yesenia Suarez and her children vanish after a fight with her jealous husband, Luis Toledo. Detectives suspect his jealousy may have led to their disappearance.

programme.title: Green Eyed Killers
programme.desc: In 2018, Ezra McCandless claims her boyfriend, Alex Woodworth, attacked her. As a love triangle unravels, McCandless's inconsistent story leads detectives to suspect a fatal outcome.

programme.title: Green Eyed Killers
programme.desc: When Shirley Pierce's fiance finds her murdered in the bathtub, detectives investigate the ransacked house - but who harbours this much jealousy for Shirley?

programme.title: Green Eyed Killers
programme.desc: When Daniel Bezemer suspected girlfriend Justine Vanderschoot of cheating, he lured her to a park-and-ride - before exacting his revenge.

programme.desc: The rape and murder of an elderly woman leaves police scrambling. With no valuables taken and no signs of forced entry, investigators think it could be an inside job committed by a predator.

programme.desc: Minnesota is a safe haven for its gay community until gunfire rips through two parks popular for cruising, leaving two men dead and one wounded. Police race to determine a connection between the cases.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here
programme.sub-title: He's One Hundred Percent A Monster
programme.desc: Trina always had a tough childhood, but it becomes a nightmare when her mother brings home her new boyfriend, Robert. He is not only controlling, but also cruel and violent. Years later she discovers that he is a killer.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates
programme.sub-title: The Truth Is In The Dirt
programme.desc: Jennifer Brown vanishes from her home and detectives race to find her. Investigators must confront a web of lies woven by people she trusts the most.

programme.title: On The Case With Paula Zahn
programme.desc: A gunman shoots a hero fireman dead in his own driveway. Police focus their investigation on the unusual firearm used to commit the crime and an odd trail of clues left behind by the victim himself.

programme.title: Death By Fame
programme.desc: A body-building attorney lands her own reality series. A year later, investigators used the show to map how she went from the spotlight to stabbing victim.

programme.desc: Jessi Hildebrandt exposes their aunt Jodi's manipulation as survivors speak out and reveal her cult-like control and the lasting damage she causes.

programme.desc: Jerry, Elaine, George and Kramer plan to go to the movies, but Jerry takes out some time to look back at nine years of memories.

programme.desc: Elaine tries to convert a gay man to heterosexuality, George is upset when his blind date turns out to be bald, and Jerry braces for a lie detector test to confirm whether he watches Melrose Place.

programme.title: SMILING ELEPHANT
programme.desc: Observe the fragile and evolving friendship between humans and elephants.

programme.title: Kenya Wildlife Diaries
programme.desc: Kenya's growing human population is taking land and resources away from wildlife. The squeeze is creating increasing numbers of conflicts between humans and animals, and is one of the biggest issues in African conservation.

programme.title: Kenya Wildlife Diaries
programme.desc: Kenyas making a massive move towards setting up the country's first community-run rhino sanctuary. Find out why Lewa reckons it's the right call, and watch the teams as they shift rhinos from all over the shop to this new conservancy.

programme.title: Kenya Wildlife Diaries
programme.desc: An endangered species, a dangerous predator, a nearby civil war and a mission to bring 50 of the world's rarest antelopes, the hirola, to a safe space enclosure.

programme.title: Waterworld Africa
programme.desc: Chart the endless cycle of moving water as African rivers flow to find the ocean. Discover how they always seem to find their way, despite unthinkable obstacles.

programme.title: Wild Wild East
programme.desc: Nova Scotia's wetlands, home to the Blanding's turtle, are at risk. But if the turtles can make it through their tough first years, they'll live for almost a century.

programme.title: Waterworld Africa
programme.desc: Southern Africa is gripped in a punishing drought. At times like this, water becomes critical to survival and wetlands become magnets for life.

programme.title: Arctic Secrets
programme.desc: The Arctic is locked in darkness for nearly seven months of the year, but when the sun comes up, the polar region sparkles into life.

programme.title: BOSAI: Science that Can Save Your Life
programme.desc: What is causing the frequent torrential rain and floods in Japan? Linear rainbands. Find out why this phenomenon is hard to predict and the latest research on forecasting linear rainbands.

programme.title: Ukiyoe EDO-LIFE
programme.desc: A group of anglers stand in a fast-moving, undulating river at the foot of a rugged cliff. They use "drifting mosquito hooks" to fish for a summer delicacy that was a favourite of the Edo townspeople.

programme.sub-title: Hot Days and Cool Nights Make Tasty Veggies
programme.desc: At the Satoyama Kitchen guesthouse in Hida Takayama, chef Nobuko, her cameraman husband Makoto and their cat Tama take us on a tasty journey of local cuisine served with a side of seasonal scenery.

programme.title: On the Wings 5min.
programme.desc: Join us on a night flight to admire Japan's stunning views on a journey from Tokyo to Fukuoka. Behold the sublime beauty of Mt. Fuji at sunset and the sparkling night views of major cities.

programme.desc: Chushingura is one of the most popular plays. It is based on a sensational historical incident when 47 masterless samurai avenged the death of their lord. Ainosuke explores it in a two-part series.

programme.title: Documentary 360
programme.sub-title: Mt. Fuji Erupts: Are We Prepared? Part 1
programme.desc: The eruption of Mt. Fuji could spew 490 million cubic meters of ash over a wide area, including Tokyo. CG and dramatization, based on the latest scientific research, highlight the potential risks.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE

programme.title: Barakan Discovers
programme.desc: In 1843, after surviving a shipwreck, 16-year-old John Manjiro found himself in the US. He later played a key role in opening Japan's doors to the world. Peter Barakan visits Manjiro's hometown, Tosa.

programme.desc: On an early spring ride around the base of this extensive mountain range, we meet an artisan making traditional snowshoes, a family making salmon trout sushi, and villagers picking medicinal herbs.

programme.title: MOUNT FUJI TRUTH
programme.desc: Mount Fuji is an icon of Japan. We explore how it attained its height and cone shape, where its water goes, and the story behind the Fujiko faith.

programme.title: CINEMATIC JOURNEY
programme.desc: Join our explorers as they pursue the cinematic beauty of Japan. Kyle Card hikes the newly designated long trail around majestic Mt. Fuji and discovers its secrets.

programme.title: Ukiyoe EDO-LIFE
programme.sub-title: Inner Conflict of the Human Soul
programme.desc: We visit the Yoshiwara district, Edo's most prominent pleasure quarters. Among the lavish spenders, courtesans and apprentices, small humanoid creatures scurry about - what could they be up to?

programme.title: Easy Japanese
programme.desc: #25 My throat hurts. / To explain a part of your body that ails you, say the part, then the particle "ga," followed by adjectives like "itai," meaning painful, and finally "n desu."

programme.sub-title: Gearing up for the Japanese Dream

programme.title: Hit Replay

programme.title: Hokuriku Proxy War
programme.desc: A Yakuza group from Osaka with dreams of national dominance moves into the snowy Hokuriku region, sparking a bloody turf war with local gangs.

programme.title: Color Out Of Space
programme.desc: After a meteorite lands in the front yard of their farm, Nathan Gardner and his family find themselves battling a mutant extraterrestrial organism that infects their minds and bodies, transforming their quiet rural life into a technicolo...

programme.title: A Bittersweet Life
programme.desc: Gangster Woo-Sun has worked his way up the ranks, earning the trust of his crime boss Mr. Kang who assigns him to follow his mistress. But Woo-Sun becomes the target when he chooses to spare the mistress and her secret lover.

programme.title: District 13: Ultimatum
programme.desc: Leito and Damien try their best to restore law and order in the ravaged District 13 that has been ruled by the mafia kings. But intelligence officers from the DISS try to interfere in their operation.

programme.title: Pusher 2
programme.desc: Tonny has just been released from prison. He must now take care of the son he has found out he has while trying to win his father, a brutal gangster king, love.

programme.title: Under The Silver Lake
programme.desc: In this stylish neo-noir, a slacker embarks on a surreal quest across LA in search of a seductive vanished woman and the truth behind the mysterious disappearances in his neighborhood.

programme.title: Severance
programme.desc: A bonding weekend goes horribly wrong for seven colleagues who find themselves facing the chop when they are sabotaged by a deadly enemy. Only the smartest will survive this brutal office outing.

programme.title: Oasis
programme.desc: An irresponsible and childish ex-con befriends a girl with cerebral palsy and develops a progressively stronger bond with her.

programme.title: A Tale Of Two Sisters
programme.desc: On returning home from a mental health facility, two sisters find that, along with their stepmother, they have to find a way to deal with their late mother's ghost who begins to haunt them.

programme.title: The Thicket
programme.desc: A hardened bounty hunter is hired to track down a ruthless killer and gathers an unlikely group to help him on a dangerous journey into a deadly wilderness.

programme.title: Police Story
programme.desc: A kung-fu policeman must protect a female witness from a Hong Kong drug lord for whom she used to work. Jackie Chan and Brigitte Lin star.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1990)
programme.desc: From their base in the city sewers, turtle heroes Michelangelo, Raphael, Leonardo and Donatello are on a mission to defeat an evil warlord and wipe out crime.

programme.title: Infernal Affairs
programme.desc: China. Chen Wing Yan, a young police officer, has been sent undercover as a mole in the local mafia. Lau Kin Ming, a young mafia member, infiltrates the police force.

programme.title: Infernal Affairs II
programme.desc: In Hong Kong, Chan Wing Yan goes undercover in the triads as Lau Kin Ming joins the police. Both sides face a common threat from a rival crime boss. (Subtitles)

programme.title: Infernal Affairs III
programme.desc: A rivalry develops between Lau and Yeung, as each tries to uncover the other's secret. Meanwhile, Lau suffers an identity collapse when he loses track of reality.

programme.title: G.I. Samurai
programme.desc: A squadron of Japanese Self-Defence Force soldiers find themselves transported through time to their country's warring states era, when rival samurai clans were battling to become the supreme Shogun.

programme.title: The Wind
programme.desc: An evil presence stalks a woman alone on the American frontier in this acclaimed western-horror.

programme.title: Naked Weapon
programme.desc: Madame M, kidnaps forty pre-teen girls to train them as the most deadly assassins. CIA operative follows the case for 6 years with no leads, but when a series of assassinations begin to occur, he suspects that Madame M is back in business.

programme.title: Sator
programme.desc: Secluded in a desolate forest, a broken family is observed by Sator, a supernatural entity who is attempting to claim them.

programme.title: You Don't Nomi: Verhoeven's Showgirls
programme.desc: A chorus of film critics and fervent devotees explore the complicated afterlife of 1995's biggest film flop, Paul Verhoeven's Showgirls, from disastrous release to cult adoration and extraordinary redemption.

programme.title: Showgirls
programme.desc: A young woman travels to Las Vegas with the desire to be one of the biggest showgirls on the strip, and plans to stop at nothing to get there, but as she climbs to the top, she realizes that her friendships, morals and soul are on the line.

programme.title: Possession
programme.desc: A woman starts exhibiting increasingly disturbing behaviour after asking her husband for a divorce. Suspicions of infidelity soon give way to something much more sinister.

programme.title: Day Of The Dead
programme.desc: As the world is overrun by zombies, a small team of scientists, civilians and military personnel trapped in an underground bunker battle desperately to ensure the survival of the human race.

programme.title: The Crying Game
programme.desc: A young recruit for the IRA is assigned to watch a British soldier kidnapped in a plan to free an Irish rebel, and he ultimately forms a bond with the man and a relationship with his girlfriend, who the recruit promises to protect.

programme.title: District 13
programme.desc: Captain Damien must team up with Leito, a local insurgent from District 13, to defuse a neutron bomb that has fallen into the hands of a local drug lord, Taha, and rescue Leito's sister Lola.

programme.title: Dark Diamond
programme.desc: After his father's death, a man vows vengeance against the relatives who abandoned him.

programme.title: Dobermann
programme.desc: The Dobermann is the slickest gangster in town and the leader of the gang of the same name. They have more bank robberies to their name than they can count. But his adversary, corrupt and ruthless cop Christini, is hell bent to capture him.

programme.title: Jungle
programme.desc: A group of friends trek into the Amazon jungle with a guide who has a mysterious past. Their journey quickly turns into a terrifying ordeal as the deadliest threats of the wilderness lead to an all-out fight for survival.

programme.title: Police Story 2
programme.desc: A dedicated Hong Kong cop's unusual policing methods result in his demotion to traffic duty, despite his success in fighting crime. Meanwhile, an old enemy is released from prison and sets out to get revenge.

programme.title: To Catch A Killer: Part 2
programme.desc: Part 2. After achieving two search warrants, Kozenczak finds a large amount of incriminating evidence, and later 29 bodies buried throughout John Gacy's property.

programme.title: Winnie The Pooh: Blood And Honey 2
programme.desc: Not wanting to live in the shadows any longer, Winnie-the-Pooh, Piglet, Owl and Tigger take their fight to the town of Ashdown, leaving a bloody trail of death and mayhem in their wake.

programme.title: The Stunt Man
programme.desc: A fugitive stumbles onto a movie set just when they need a new stunt man, takes the job as a way to hide out and falls for the leading lady while facing off with his manipulative director.

programme.title: Project Wolf Hunting
programme.desc: During transport, a group of hardened criminals stages a jailbreak that quickly escalates into a bloody, all-out riot. As the fugitives exact their brutal terror campaign onboard the ship, something even more terrifying emerges from below.

programme.title: The Collection
programme.desc: After being celebrated for escaping from "The Collector," an infamous serial killer who makes it impossible for anyone to get away alive, a man is forced to get into a booby-trapped warehouse to save an innocent woman from the murderer.

programme.title: Caligula: The Ultimate Cut
programme.desc: Excess, violence and corruption mark the notorious emperor's reign in first-century Rome.

programme.title: The House That Jack Built
programme.desc: We follow the highly intelligent Jack through 5 incidents and are introduced to the murders that define Jacks development as a serial killer. We experience the story from Jacks point of view. He views each murder as an artwork in itself.

programme.title: The Chaser
programme.desc: A former police officer turned pimp begins searching for missing women who worked for him. He discovers they all visited the same client before disappearing, leading him into a dark and violent hunt.

programme.title: New Life
programme.desc: A mysterious woman on the run, and the resourceful fixer assigned to bring her in. Their two unique stories inextricably link, as the stakes of the pursuit rise to apocalyptic proportions.

programme.title: Vesper
programme.desc: Struggling to survive with her father after the collapse of Earth's ecosystem, 13-year-old Vesper must use her wits, strength and bio-hacking abilities to fight for the future.

programme.title: Wasabi
programme.desc: When a French policeman is forced to take a leave of absence, he returns to Japan, where he reunites with old friends and attempts to find the reason his estranged girlfriend abandoned him years ago, leading to the discovery of a hidden ...

programme.title: Coming Home In The Dark
programme.desc: A school teacher is forced to confront a brutal act from his past when a pair of ruthless drifters takes him and his family on a nightmare road-trip.

programme.title: Terrifier
programme.desc: A maniacal clown named Art, terrorizes three young women on Halloween night and everyone else who stands in his way.

programme.title: Terrifier 2
programme.desc: Resurrected by a sinister entity, Art the Clown returns to Miles County to terrorise a teenage girl and her younger brother on Halloween night.

programme.title: I Spit On Your Grave
programme.desc: An aspiring writer is repeatedly sexually abused, humiliated, and left for dead by four men whom she systematically hunts down to seek revenge, inflicting upon them every horrifying and torturous moment they carried out on her.

programme.title: Cops Vs Thugs
programme.desc: Kenkei tai soshiki boryoku" is a gripping Japanese crime drama delving into the dark underworld of organized crime and the relentless pursuit of justice, with a web of secrets and betrayals at its core.

programme.title: Hokuriku Proxy War
programme.desc: A Yakuza group from Osaka with dreams of national dominance moves into the snowy Hokuriku region, sparking a bloody turf war with local gangs.

programme.title: House Of The Devil
programme.desc: Desperate for quick cash, college sophomore Samantha Hughes takes a babysitting job in the isolated mansion of the creepy Ulman family. Samantha has no idea that a nightmare of unspeakable fear and torment awaits her within these walls.

programme.title: Final Cut
programme.desc: A film crew is in the process of shooting a low budget zombie horror movie when they unexpectedly find themselves fighting for their lives when real zombies begin to attack, and they must try to work together in hopes of survival.

programme.title: Pusher 1
programme.desc: A failed drug deal leaves small-time criminal Frank owing money to a ruthless Copenhagen drug lord. As pressure mounts, he is pulled deeper into the city's brutal underworld. Mads Mikkelsen stars in Nicolas Winding Refns gritty crime thr...

programme.title: Pusher 2
programme.desc: Tonny has just been released from prison. He must now take care of the son he has found out he has while trying to win his father, a brutal gangster king, love.

programme.title: Pusher 3
programme.desc: This bloody and utterly captivating film completes Danish director Nicolas Winding Refn's crime trilogy. Copenhagen's biggest king pin must rethink his status when a younger crowd rolls in.

programme.title: The Last Stop In Yuma County
programme.desc: A traveling knife salesman finds himself stranded and forced to wait at an isolated rest stop. He soon realizes he has wandered into a violent hostage situation upon the arrival of two bank robbers who are on the run after a recent heist.

programme.title: The Wind
programme.desc: An evil presence stalks a woman alone on the American frontier in this acclaimed western-horror.

programme.title: Infernal Affairs II
programme.desc: In Hong Kong, Chan Wing Yan goes undercover in the triads as Lau Kin Ming joins the police. Both sides face a common threat from a rival crime boss. (Subtitles)

programme.title: Wrong Place
programme.desc: Bruce Willis finds himself as the prey in this action thriller. A former police chief is hunted down to prevent him from delivering eyewitness testimony against a drug family.

programme.title: Black Death
programme.desc: Set during the time of the first outbreak of bubonic plague in England, a young monk is given the task of learning the truth about reports of people being brought back to life in a small village.

programme.title: Bride Of Re-Animator
programme.desc: A mad doctor and his accomplice return to the scene of a zombie massacre to continue their bodybuilding experiments.

programme.title: Beyond Re-Animator
programme.desc: After 13 years in prison, the mad scientist from Re-Animator (1985) gets a new chance to experiment with the arrival of a young prison doctor, who secretly hopes to learn to reanimate dead people. Good intentions turn to horror.

programme.title: Cypher
programme.desc: Sci-fi thriller with Jeremy Northam and Lucy Liu. A man takes a job as an industrial spy without understanding the true nature of the role, nor its dangers. Violence/strong language.

programme.title: Amulet
programme.desc: An ex-soldier, living homeless in London, is offered a place to stay at a decaying house inhabited by a young woman and her dying mother. As he starts to fall for her, he cannot ignore his suspicion that something sinister is going on.

programme.title: Quest For Fire
programme.desc: 80,000 years ago, human survival depended on fire. The Ulam tribe could use and protect it, but not create it. When their flame is accidentally extinguished, their way of life and survival are put at risk.

programme.title: The Raid
programme.desc: A SWAT team is trapped in a tenement run by a ruthless mobster and his army of killers and thugs. Stranded on the sixth floor, they must fight their way through the city's worst to survive.

programme.title: Hellraiser (1987)
programme.desc: A man opens a mysterious puzzle box and is taken to a hellish realm. After escaping and returning to his family home, he must rely on human blood to restore himself, forming a dangerous alliance with a family member.

programme.title: Apex
programme.desc: A group of elite hunters pay to hunt down a man on a deserted island, only to find themselves becoming the prey.

programme.title: Cops Reloaded
programme.desc: A Houston officer joins in a chase of a vehicle used in a homicide, and the driver refuses to stop; a deputy patrols an area known for its drug activity; a domestic disturbance in Riverside County; Vegas officer responds to a call of a s...

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Katie Eustace pursues an old Golf that has failed to stop and is occupied by a very unusual criminal pairing: a mother and her son. The Operation Reacher team execute a dawn raid on a suspected drug dealer.

programme.title: Ambulance Australia
programme.desc: Former call-taker Laura goes out on her very first shift on the road as a paramedic. Her first call-out sees her attend a man suffering chest pains at Sydney's busy airport.

programme.title: Code 1: Extreme
programme.desc: All hands on deck at a major car accident. A tourist takes a huge fall & Dr Gooch heads north where a passenger was thrown from a vehicle.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: After decades apart, Jamie and Claire finally reunite and rekindle their emotional and physical bonds. But Jamie's new business dealings jeopardize the couple's hopes for a simple life together.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: In the aftermath of a violent confrontation, Claire follows her conscience as a surgeon, even though it could put her and Jamie's lives at risk. Jamie attempts to evade the reach of the Crown as its representative closes in on his illega...

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire returns to Lallybroch with Jamie, where she does not receive quite the reception she was expecting. Unbeknownst to her, Jamie's made some choices in their time apart which come back to haunt them with a vengeance.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Jamie leave Scotland, sailing to the West Indies on an urgent quest. But when the superstitious crew looks for someone to blame after a string of bad luck, rescue comes from an unlikely source.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire races to discover the source of an epidemic aboard a disease-stricken ship before hundreds of sailors die. And as Jamie locks horns with Captain Raines, Fergus finds himself torn between loyalty and love.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: After making a leap of faith, Claire washes up on a seemingly deserted island where survival is her only option.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: The Artemis finally reaches Jamaica bringing Jamie and Claire that much closer to their goal. During a lavish ball on the island, the Frasers encounter old allies, as well as former adversaries who threaten to derail their mission.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire is forced to play a game of cat and mouse with an old adversary as she searches for Young Ian. The Frasers race through the jungles of Jamaica to prevent the unthinkable.

programme.desc: Four months after arriving in America, Jamie and Claire bid farewell to a friend, cross paths with a pirate and weigh an offer from a governor.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie's Aunt Jocasta welcomes the weary travelers to her lavish plantation, where Claire's views on slavery soon stir up trouble.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: After refusing his aunt's plantation, Jamie and Claire set out into the North Carolina wilderness to make a new home.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: As the Frasers start work on their new home, unsettling encounters put them on edge. Roger calls Brianna to share a big discovery.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: While helping deliver a baby, Claire becomes caught in a bitter dispute. Jamie gets a big surprise when he travels to town to recruit new tenants.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: A pair of unexpected visitors bring Jamie's memories of Helwater rushing back - and stoke tensions at Fraser's Ridge.

programme.desc: Brianna travels through time at Craigh Na Dun to intervene in her parents' deaths at Fraser's Ridge.

programme.desc: As Roger arrives in Wilmington looking for Brianna, Jamie and Claire must keep Governor Tryon from ambushing Murtagh and the Regulators.

programme.desc: As Jamie continues to hunt Murtagh with the aid of the zealous Lieutenant Hamilton Knox, he's forced to consider whether or not he's on the right side of history.

programme.desc: Jamie and Claire help a bondservant rescue his twin brother from their abusive master, but discover that the situation is much more complicated than they had initially thought.
